name: Bully: Scholarship Edition
post_apply_message: Bully SE — installs SilentPatch + Widescreen Fix (both freely redistributable, committed to the repo). Launch option combines the required dinput8 ASI-loader override with --skipMoviesASAP to skip the intro logos. In-game: enable Vsync for correct frame pacing with the SilentPatch fps unlock, otherwise you'll see intermittent micro-stutter. If you want to change resolution/FOV, edit plugins/Bully.WidescreenFix.ini in the game folder.
notes: Two fixes bundled: SilentPatch by CookiePLMonster (SilentPatchBully v3 BETA — currently the only stable release, MIT-licensed) fixes Windows-10+ crashes and adds frame-rate unlock; WidescreenFix by ThirteenAG adds widescreen/ultrawide support. Both ship dinput8.dll (Ultimate ASI Loader) — I kept the widescreen zip's newer version. --skipMoviesASAP is a native command-line switch the game supports (per PCGW), no file removal needed. Committed 2026-07-07 from SilentPatchBully BUILD-3-TEST (sha256 4f609f22...) and WidescreenFixesPack tag 'bully' (sha256 3759850e...).
